topic: What does it mean to support mitochondria?
anchor_set: Set C answer-card clarity + Set D logic framing + Set H pacing
source_strategy: fresh Nano Banana cover plate + design-first compositor for the body slides
fallback_source: fallback to a previously approved Nano Banana source image, then fallback to a calmer type-led white-card cover only if the image lane fails
visual_intent: fresh image-backed cover with protected text zone
semantic icon support only where it improves clarity
brand_guardrails: Keep the carousel calm, premium, and medically responsible.
Do not use decorative random shapes.
Do not let the infographic layer overpower the copy.
No English workflow labels, badge residue, or internal scaffolding.
Center labels and module text by actual geometry, not approximation.
Use editorial Japanese line breaks, not forced box wrapping.
composition: image-backed cover with cool white wash and protected text zone
white or near-white inner slides with cool mist-blue structure
cover, clarification card, support model, daily reading lens, save close
compact answer cards and clean rule-based dividers
subtle semantic icons for sleep, nutrition, and movement
reference_strategy: Use Set C for the explanatory card behavior, Set D for relationship logic, Set H for cover pacing, and the cool-palette anchor for atmosphere, then compress the whole set into a cleaner Mitozz definition carousel.
variation_guardrails: Do not repeat the April 3 selector-strip behavior literally.
Do not copy the March 23 or March 27 education-card layout.
Keep the cover definition-led rather than dramatic.
Use the infographic support only when it clarifies the copy.
Keep the close slide distinct from the body-card rhythm.

text_overlay.headline_ja:
ミトコンドリアを支えるって
どういうこと？
slides_ja: 「支える」は、何かひとつで変えるという意味ではありません。
睡眠、食事、運動。日々の条件を落ち着いて見直す視点です。
睡眠、食事、運動は同じ土台を支える日常の条件です。
難しい仕組みを覚えるより、毎日の状態をどう読むかが先です。
まずは土台の見方から。
text_overlay.cta_ja: 保存して、あとでやさしく見返す。

notes: April 6 educational carousel. The job is to translate a vague science phrase into daily understanding without sounding simplistic or technical. Use a fresh image-backed cover plate for atmosphere, keep the text zone protected, and keep the body slides disciplined, semantic, and quietly save-worthy.
